items.title: De Minaur and Djokovic bundled out of French Open leaving draw wide open

items.content: Novak Djokovic’s bid for an elusive 25th major title has ended in Paris after youngsters Joao Fonseca and Jakub Mensik each claimed major scalps in the third round.
